description: Tutorial evidence fixture for the first 'Two Birds, One Puff' pulse. The carried Bramble Spear clears wave 1 and chips the lane-2 bird in wave 2; one lane-1 Pollen Puff detonation then finishes both paired Thornwings in the opener.

evidence.claim: The first Pollen Puff shot in tutorial wave 2 finishes both paired Thornwings once the persistent Bramble Spear has already tagged lane 2.
